prose: **Pyridine frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**) with density fitting enabled, in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: supplied as a fixed `.xyz` file ('pyridine.xyz'); orbitals computed at this geometry without relaxation. SCF converged in 10 cycles. HOMO = −7.25260 eV, LUMO = −1.11279 eV → **gap ≈ 6.13981 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy). Files: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmppv_yz8pl/live.json`. Command: `... frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --solvent gas pyridine.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmppv_yz8pl/live.json`. No warnings reported during the run.
